subject: Update GitHub Actions CI/CD for Astro builds
description: Phase 6: Merge deploy.yml and auto-update.yml into a single consolidated workflow. Add Node.js setup and npm run build (Astro) step. Keep Python data pipeline steps (wikidata_seed, content_agent, price_job, news_fetch, build). Add new_product_detector step. Deploy via GitHub Pages. Eliminate race conditions between workflows.
